Apex Legends Logo (Flat White Background)
nodes.visual_notes: Flat 2D Apex Legends chevron/triangle logo in bold red on a pure white background. Same iconic brand mark as global.png but rendered flat (no 3D bevel). High resolution (3840x2160). Color palette: bright red (#E8192C approx), white background. Purpose: global branding asset, light-theme/print variant.

nodes.label: Apex Legends Logo (3D Dark Background)
nodes.visual_notes: 3D-rendered Apex Legends chevron/triangle logo in solid red/crimson against a dark charcoal-grey background. The logo is the iconic Apex Legends brand mark: a stylized 'A' shape with upward-pointing triangle and two downward-pointing notches at the base, rendered with depth/bevel giving a 3D effect. Color palette: red (#CC2222 approx), dark grey background. Purpose: global branding asset, dark-theme variant.

nodes.label: Fuse (Apex Legend)
nodes.visual_notes: Male character with mohawk hairstyle and thick mustache. Wears a leather jacket over a white t-shirt with a skull belt buckle. Has a prominent gold mechanical/prosthetic left arm with ammunition bandoliers across chest. Right arm wears a red fingerless glove. Carries a firearm over shoulder. Lower legs feature green-tipped grenades/explosives attached to armor. Color palette: gold, dark red/maroon, grey, white. Role indicators: explosive ordinance specialist, offensive legend.

nodes.label: Horizon (Apex Legend)
nodes.visual_notes: Female character with short reddish-brown hair. Wears sci-fi astronaut/astrophysicist-inspired suit in mint/teal-green and white with red accent details. Has red-lens goggles pushed up on forehead. Wears white and teal-green mechanical armor with gloves. Right hand raised upward in a gesture suggesting gravity manipulation or beckoning. Color palette: mint green, white, red accents, dark blue-grey underlayer. Role indicators: science/gravity manipulation specialist, skirmisher legend.

nodes.label: Gibraltar (Apex Legend)
nodes.visual_notes: Large, heavily built male character with brown hair pulled back. Wears heavy white and grey tactical armor with prominent large shield on left arm featuring orange accent stripes. Carries a handgun in right hand. Back-mounted equipment pack visible. Armor features tribal/Polynesian-inspired tattoo design on left forearm area. Color palette: white, grey, orange accents, dark skin tone. Role indicators: defensive shield specialist, support/defensive legend.

hyperedges.label: Chunk 06 Apex Legends (Octane, Pathfinder, Rampart, Revenant, Seer)
